achievements.title: Placement
achievements.short: The Training and Placement Cell of our Government Engineering College serves as the vital link between the institute and the corporate world.
achievements.long:
The Training and Placement Cell of our Government Engineering College serves as the vital link between the institute and the corporate world. It plays a crucial role in fostering a collaborative relationship with industries and organizations across the nation.
Our cell is committed to building a strong placement record, both in terms of the percentage of students securing employment and the diverse array of companies visiting our campus. Through dedicated efforts, the cell ensures that every aspiring student is provided with ample opportunities and guidance to achieve a promising career aligned with their aspirations and potential.
